Paths: Android/app/src/main/java/com/dmdbrands/gurus/weight/features/manualEntry/helper/EntryHelper.kt
Summary: MA-3998 Fix visceral fat manual entry stored as one-tenth of value Visceral fat uses AppInputType.NUMBER (integer level), not BODY_COMP (implicit-decimal percentage), so the form value is the literal entered string. Dividing by 10 on save treated '7' as '0.7', which then round-tripped through convertToStored/convertToD

canonical.content:
Git lesson from 855ee1386386

Source commit: 855ee1386386

canonical.content:
Git lesson from 552bca5c7cb3

Source commit: 552bca5c7cb3
Paths: Android/app/src/main/java/com/dmdbrands/gurus/weight/features/manualEntry/helper/EntryHelper.kt
Summary: MA-3998 Fix visceral fat manual entry stored as one-tenth of value Visceral fat uses AppInputType.NUMBER (integer level), not BODY_COMP (implicit-decimal percentage), so the form value is the literal entered string. Dividing by 10 on save treated '7' as '0.7', which then round-tripped through convertToStored/convertToD

Summary: MA-3998 Fix visceral fat manual entry stored as one-tenth of value Visceral fat uses AppInputType.NUMBER (integer level), not BODY_COMP (implicit-decimal percentage), so the form value is the literal entered string. Dividing by 10 on save treated '7' as '0.7', which then round-tripped through convertToStored/convertToD

Summary: MA-3998 Fix visceral fat manual entry stored as one-tenth of value Visceral fat uses AppInputType.NUMBER (integer level), not BODY_COMP (implicit-decimal percentage), so the form value is the literal entered string. Dividing by 10 on save treated '7' as '0.7', which then round-tripped through convertToStored/convertToD
